chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI M.A. No.06 of 2019 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hg of CMA No.1185/2019 3.For hg of main case 29.01.2025. Mr. Muneer Iqbal, advocate for appellant. Mr. Khalid Hidayat Khan, advocate for respondent No. 1. Mr. Saleem Ghulam Hussain, advocate for respondent No. 2. With consent, the impugned order, which lacks reasons in favour of findings, is set aside. Consequently, the Registrar of Trademarks is directed to decide the issue between the parties within two months through cogent reasons after affording an opportunity of hearing to both the parties. The Misc. Appeal is accordingly disposed of along with pending application. JUDGE HANIF
